description: Normalized monthly proxy curves for emitter emission-profile inference. Values are rate multipliers with mean month = 1, not measured facility CO2 emissions.

curves.recommended_use: Primary Nordic analog proxy for Klemetsrud only if no plant-level monthly waste, heat, or CO2 data is available.
curves.method: Hourly Waste generation was averaged by local calendar month for 2021-2025, then the 12 monthly means were normalized so their arithmetic mean is 1.
limitations: Country-level electricity generation, not plant-level emissions.
Electricity output can differ from waste combustion because CHP plants trade off electricity and heat extraction.
Use as an analog seasonal shape only; scale separately to the annual CO2 anchor.

curves.recommended_use: Sensitivity case only. It is geographically closer to Klemetsrud, but the summer peak suggests electricity output is affected by CHP heat-electricity allocation and may not track CO2 emissions.
curves.method: Hourly Waste generation was averaged by local calendar month for 2021-2025, then the 12 monthly means were normalized so their arithmetic mean is 1.
limitations: Country-level electricity generation, not plant-level emissions.
Summer peak is likely not a direct emissions signal for a district-heating waste-to-energy plant.
Use only as a sensitivity curve unless corroborated by plant-level waste throughput or heat data.
